tree.setup: Your friend Xiao Yan notices you listening to music on your headphones and asks what you're listening to.
tree.setup_zh: 你的朋友小燕看到你戴着耳机听音乐，问你在听什么。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你在听什么歌啊？看你听得很开心的样子。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ zài tīng shénme gē a? Kàn nǐ tīng de hěn kāixīn de yàngzi.
turns.text_en: What song are you listening to? You look like you're really enjoying it.

options.text_zh: 一首很安静的中文歌，叫《晴天》。旋律特别好听，你要不要听听？
options.text_pinyin: Yī shǒu hěn ānjìng de Zhōngwén gē, jiào "Qíngtiān". Xuánlǜ tèbié hǎotīng, nǐ yào bú yào tīngtīng?
options.text_en: A quiet Chinese song called 'Sunny Day.' The melody is really beautiful — want to listen?
options.feedback: Shares enthusiastically and offers to let her listen.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 哇，真好听！歌词也很美。我最近一直在听一个新的歌手，她的声音很特别。我们交换歌单吧？
turns.text_pinyin: Wā, zhēn hǎotīng! Gēcí yě hěn měi. Wǒ zuìjìn yīzhí zài tīng yī ge xīn de gēshǒu, tā de shēngyīn hěn tèbié. Wǒmen jiāohuàn gēdān ba?
turns.text_en: Wow, it's lovely! The lyrics are beautiful too. I've been listening to a new singer lately — her voice is really unique. Want to swap playlists?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the playlist swap idea.

options.text_zh: 好啊！我最喜欢发现新的好歌了。你发给我，我也把我的歌单分享给你。
options.text_pinyin: Hǎo a! Wǒ zuì xǐhuan fāxiàn xīn de hǎo gē le. Nǐ fā gěi wǒ, wǒ yě bǎ wǒ de gēdān fēnxiǎng gěi nǐ.
options.text_en: Sure! I love discovering new music. Send me yours and I'll share mine too.

tree.cultural_note: Sharing music and playlists (歌单) is a popular form of friendship bonding among young Chinese. Songs are often shared through WeChat or music apps. Discovering new music through friends is valued as a form of cultural exchange.
